data.title: Service Booking
data.content: Customers can book car service online through the MG Motor India service platform. Available for models like Hector, Astor, ZS EV, and Gloster.

data.title: Shield Protect Plan
data.content: MG Shield Protect offers prepaid maintenance plans for up to 5 years. It covers periodic service, wear and tear parts, and protection packages.

data.title: Roadside Assistance
data.content: 24x7 roadside assistance is available for breakdowns and emergencies. Customers can call 1800-100-6464 for immediate support.

data.title: Owner Manual
data.content: Customers can download owner manuals, e-manuals, and warranty documents for all MG vehicles from the service portal.

data.title: Cost of Ownership
data.content: MG provides cost of ownership estimates including maintenance cost per kilometer for petrol and diesel vehicles.

data.title: Service Network
data.content: MG Motor India has an extensive service network across multiple cities with authorized service centers and trained technicians.

data.title: Customer Support
data.content: MG offers customer support services including helpline, email support, and dealership assistance for all service-related queries.

data.title: Digital Service Experience
data.content: MG provides a digital-first service experience including online booking, real-time updates, and connected car service tracking.
